title: Imitating the Strinova Mechanism（卡拉彼丘）
description:
It supports turning into a paper man like Strinova to climb walls and float.Press the Ctrl key to become a paper man. Press the R key to climb the wall near the wall. Press the ctrl key in the air to fly
咕咕嘎嘎
body: It supports turning into a paper man like Strinova to climb walls and float.Press the Ctrl key to become a paper man. Press the R key to climb the wall near the wall. Press the ctrl key in the air to fly
